summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The TrueShares Eagle Global Next Gen Power Infrastructure ETF is an actively managed fund focused on companies involved in alternative and renewable energy infrastructure globally.

data.title: TrueMark Investments Announces LRNZ and RNWZ ETFs Moving to Cboe BZX Exchange
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, TrueMark Investments (“TrueMark”) announces plans to transfer the listings of the TrueShares Technology, AI & Deep Learning ETF (LRNZ) and the TrueShares Eagle Global ...
